20.reason: [This loop resets the entire array to initial state (1,2,...,n) on every call to exchange, destroying any permutation progress. It should not be here.]

45.reason: [Because exchange() incorrectly resets the array, the backtracking step does not restore the original state properly, leading to wrong permutations and possibly duplicates or missing outputs.]
